title: CADO Card Usage

title: Lamb Tajine Recipes

title: Outdoor Car Protection

narrative: The user seeks a thorough, practical guide for maintaining a car that remains outside for long periods. Relevant content must provide specific preventive actions—including choosing shade, avoiding parking under trees, keeping the fuel tank full, using rodent repellents, protecting windshield washer fluid, preventing interior moisture, maintaining the battery, and periodically replacing brake fluid—and explain how each measure mitigates risks such as UV degradation, corrosion, rodent damage, moisture‑induced electrical problems, and mechanical wear.
